name: pea starch
description: A plant-derived carbohydrate used to thicken and stabilize the texture of food products.
raw_text: Beef barley soup, beef barley: Beef stock, cooked beef, carrots, barley, tomato paste, diced tomatoes, celery, peas, potatoes, corn, modified food starch, contains less than 1% of: beef fat, salt, wheat flour, maltodextrin, beef flavor, sugar, onion powder, spice extract, garlic powder, hydrolyzed corn protein, hydrolyzed wheat gluten, hydrolyzed soy protein, spice, caramel color. | Chunky Vegetable Beef Ready To Serve Soup: WATER, CARROTS, POTATOES, SEASONED COOKED BEEF (BEEF, WATER, SALT, SODIUM PHOSPHATE), CELERY, TOMATO PUREE (WATER, TOMATO PASTE), DICED TOMATOES (TOMATOES, TOMATO JUICE, SALT, CITRIC ACID, CALCIUM CHLORIDE), CORN, GREEN BEANS, PEAS, MODIFIED FOOD STARCH, | Chunky Beef With Homestyle Vegetables Ready To Serve Soup: BEEF STOCK, CARROTS POTATOES, SEASONED COOKED BEEF (BEEF, WATER, SALT, SODIUM PHOSPHATE), TOMATO PUREE (WATER, TOMATO PASTE), PEAS, CELERY, WATER, POTATO STARCH, CONTAINS LESS THAN 2% OF THE FOLLOWING INGREDIENTS: WHEAT FLOUR, SALT, SOYBEAN OIL, CORN STARCH, CARAMEL COLORING, SPICE EXTRACT.
